title: OpenCode Systems OC Messaging and USSD Gateway

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - OpenCode Systems OC Messaging and USSD Gateway
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

    condition: selection_dns
level: high
